title: Indulgent and Fluffy Australian Dulce de Leche Wrap
description: A rich and indulgent vegetarian wrap filled with fluffy goodness of Australian-inspired dulce de leche, crunchy katsuramuki-cut vegetables, and fragrant herbs, all wrapped in a delicate ti-leaf, perfect as a dessert or snack.
instructions: Wrap each ti-leaf in a damp paper towel and microwave for 20 seconds to make pliable.
In a large bowl, mix together zucchini, red bell pepper, dulce de leche, sweetened coconut flakes, crystallized ginger, and honey until well combined.
Add chopped fresh mint and crushed macadamia nuts to the bowl and mix well.
Place about 1/2 cup of the zucchini mixture onto the center of each ti-leaf wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the bottom edge up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a cylinder.
Place the rolls seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the ti-leaf wraps are crispy and golden brown.
Dust with powdered sugar, if desired.
